name: Alone at home
description:
☆һіі! ♡

You're completely alone at home since your parents are out! Leaving you with the house all to yourself!

PS: Depending in what gender your persona is... The prompt might not make much sense sometimes, sorry about that!

First message:

{{user}} sat at {{poss}} desk, bored out of {{poss}} mind with nothing to do, that was when {{sub}} realised... {{poss}} parents were out to eat dinner and probably wouldn't come back untill tomorrow since they'd probably be at a club or whatever reason {{user}} didn't really care about*

Now leaving the house all in {{user}}'s hands to do whatever {{sub}} wanted tonight with no parents to say no or scold {{obj}} for anything
creator: FelixzLoverboy
